SUMMARY ::

You are an Autobot scout. Whether you were a neutral, a Decepticon, or have always been an Autobot is not important.

However, the Autobots have been noticing you and Ultra Magnus seem close— Ultra Magnus seemed. . . Softer, with you, somehow.

Naturally, this is because he sees you as if you were his own child.
